title: Delhi High Courts orders blocking of ‘Come Sports’ apps mimicking Dream11
description: The Delhi High Court has restrained operators of several rogue fantasy gaming applications from using trademarks belonging to Dream11 and copying the platform’s mobile application interface [Sporta Technologies Vs Come Sports].Justice Jyoti Singh passed the interim order on February 24 while hearing a suit filed by Sporta Technologies Private Limited (plaintiff), the operator of Dream11. The Court also directed the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) and the Ministry of Electronics and Inform
